calendar.matters:
Petition For Termination Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alexandra Letzel and Leah Bishop appeared by telephone for Richard Grant. Jr. (Trustee).

Ms. Bishop stated that they were not expecting anyone else, that an identical petition was heard and granted by this Court on August 3, 2016, that the Trust was set up by the same Settlor and that the only difference was there were multiple charities. Ms. Bishop also stated that the Trustee requested they seek the same relief, that the Beneficiaries' goal is to be able to significantly modify investments for growth and made reference to the Uniform Prudent Investor Act of 1995. The Petition to Terminate Trust is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Termination Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Continued To Mar-28-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Dividing Trust
Off Calendar Apr-08-2013 Off Calendar
